name: Iter16 — Nav badge counts on History and Comparisons
description: Verify that the History and Comparisons nav links show badge counts, and that deleting an item updates the badge immediately.

planSteps.description: The navbar shows a small numeric badge next to the 'History' link (e.g. a number like 31 or any positive integer)
The navbar shows a small numeric badge next to the 'Comparisons' link (any non-negative integer, or 0 if empty)
Click the 'History' nav link to go to /dashboard
The History page loads with a table of reviews
Note the current badge number shown next to 'History' in the navbar
Click the 🗑️ delete button on any review row and confirm the deletion
The deleted row disappears from the table AND the badge number next to 'History' in the navbar decreased by 1 immediately without a page reload
